name: Classic Lavender
description: Soothing organic lavender scent, perfect for relaxation and evening wind-down.

name: Royal Crimson (Velvet Rose & Oud)
description: A rich, mysterious blend of velvet damask rose wrapped in smoky oud wood and amber.

name: Golden Glow (Amber & Vanilla)
description: Warm, comforting notes of baltic amber combined with sweet, rich Madagascan vanilla.

name: Forest Mist (Cedarwood & Pine)
description: Fresh and earthy aroma of rain-soaked pine needles, cedarwood, and herbal notes.

name: Midnight Jasmine
description: An alluring, sweet floral scent of blooming night jasmine with a touch of white musk.

name: Spiced Cinnamon & Honey
description: Cozy scent of warm ground cinnamon, spiced cloves, and a drizzle of sweet organic honey.

name: Citrus Breeze (Orange & Bergamot)
description: Uplifting and refreshing zesty bergamot blended with sweet orange blossom.

name: Sacred Sandalwood
description: Earthy, woodsy sandalwood base with soft undertones of patchouli and clean musk.
